description: Mixed response — does the model emit both content text AND tool_calls in the same response?

messages.content: You are a coding assistant. Always briefly explain your reasoning before using a tool.
Check what Python version is installed.

function.name: bash
function.description: Run a shell command; returns stdout+stderr.

function.name: read
function.description: Read a file; returns contents with line numbers.

expect.notes: Key observation: is content null/empty or does it contain explanatory text? This varies significantly across models.
